QueryAndParseRecordList.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryAndParseRecordList.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 1000, default is 1000
QueryAndParseRecordList.rr: Host record, can be used with the searchType field to select the appropriate matching mode
QueryAndParseRecordList.searchMode: Matching mode for rr; LIKE for fuzzy match, EXACT for exact match (default)
QueryAndParseRecordList.type: DNS record type, currently supports A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, PTR, SRV
